sections.paragraph:
- Original: Σαλμώνη

- Transliteration: Salmone

- Phonetic: sal-mo'-nay

- Definition: Salmone = "clothed"

1. a bold promontory on the east point of the island of Crete

- Origin: perhaps of similar origin to G4529

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Location

- Strong's: Perhaps of similar origin to G4529; Salmone a place in Crete: - Salmone.
